mapper.select: SELECT c.qna_comment_id, c.qna_id, c.member_id, c.qna_comment_content, c.qna_comment_created_at, c.qna_comment_updated_at, m.member_name FROM qna_comment c JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.qna_id = #{qnaId} ORDER BY c.qna_comment_created_at ASC

SELECT c.qna_comment_id, c.qna_id, c.member_id, c.qna_comment_content, c.qna_comment_created_at, c.qna_comment_updated_at, m.member_name FROM qna_comment c JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.qna_comment_id = #{qnaCommentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna_comment (qna_id, member_id, qna_comment_content, qna_comment_created_at, qna_comment_updated_at) VALUES (#{qnaId}, #{memberId}, #{qnaCommentContent}, NOW(), NOW())
